language.empty: Kāore he reo e wātea ana

dialog.snapshot_overwrite_save: Tuhia anō te kōnae hopunga kuputuhi e tīariari ana?
dialog.snapshot_overwrite_load: Whakakapia te kuputuhi o nāianei ki te hopunga kua tīpakohia "{name}"?
dialog.task_library_row_save_overwrite: Kua tīariari kē tētahi tāurunga ko "{name}" te ingoa i te pātaka. Tuhia anō?
dialog.task_link_trust_host: Whakawhirinaki ki tēnei hautū mai i tēnei wā
dialog.disconnect_google_ocr_detail: Ka whakakore tēnei i te tōkena takiuru Google OCR kua tiakina, ā, ka muku hoki i te kōnae tōkena paetata o tēnei taupānga. Ka noho pea ngā raraunga OAuth Google paetata e whakahaerehia ana e te taupānga kia taea ai te tūhono anō i te OCR ā muri ake.
dialog.delete_preset_none: Kāore he preset kua tīpakohia hei muku.
dialog.restore_defaults_confirm: Whakahokia ngā preset taunoa (whānui me te reo "{lang}") ki te taketake? Ka whakahoki tēnei i ngā mukunga me ngā panoni ki ngā preset taunoa mō te reo hohe.
dialog.edit_preset_none: Kāore he preset kua tīpakohia hei whakatika.
dialog.edit_preset_confirm: E tino hiahia ana koe ki te whakakapi i "{name}" ki te preset o nāianei?
dialog.update_message: Kei te wātea tētahi putanga hou {remote}. O nāianei: {local}. Tikiake ināianei?
dialog.update_up_to_date_message: Kei a koe kē te putanga hou rawa ({local}).
dialog.update_failed_message: Tirohia tō hononga ka ngana anō.
